channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Matthew Anderson: Life and Career After The Dead Files TV Show
item.description: Matthew Anderson is well known for his role in the paranormal investigation show The Dead Files, where he worked as assistant to psychic medium Amy Allan. He joined the programme in 2011 and featured ...

item.title: Rahul’s 60 and Kuldeep’s 3/29 power Delhi Capitals to 40-run win over KKR in IPL 2026 league finale
item.description: Delhi Capitals ended their IPL 2026 campaign on a positive note with a comprehensive 40-run victory over Kolkata Knight Riders in the final league match at Eden Gardens, Kolkata. Batting first after K...

item.title: Trump Calls for Stronger White House Security After Gunman Was Shot by Secret Service
item.description: US President Donald Trump has called for stronger security measures around the White House after Secret Service agents shot and killed a gunman outside the presidential complex on Saturday evening. Th...

item.title: Computer Classroom Practices and Technology in 1972
item.description: The article describes what computer science education looked like in 1972, a period when computing technology was still in its early stages and largely inaccessible compared to today. Computer classes...

item.title: RR Pogoy Steps Up as TNT Triumphs Over Meralco Without Import Player in PBA Match
item.description: In a thrilling PBA Commissioner's Cup game, TNT Tropang Giga secured a hard-fought victory against Meralco Bolts even without their import player. RR Pogoy emerged as the standout performer, deliverin...

item.title: Vancouver man to serve additional 227 days in custody after multiple assaults, including attack on teenager
item.description: A Vancouver man has been sentenced following a series of violent and sexually inappropriate offences committed against multiple women between 2024 and 2025, including a particularly disturbing assault...

item.title: Arsenal Celebrate Premier League Title With Win Over Crystal Palace
item.description: Arsenal don officially celebrate their Premier League title after dem beat Crystal Palace 2-1 for their final league match of the season at Selhurst Park. Na the first time in 22 years wey the North L...

item.title: Liverpool's The Jacaranda venue temporarily renamed The Maccaranda in collaboration with Paul McCartney
item.description: The historic Liverpool music venue The Jacaranda has temporarily changed its name to The Maccaranda as part of a collaboration with Sir Paul McCartney. The venue, which opened in 1958 by The Beatles’ ...

item.title: Xreal claims smart glasses market is reaching a turning point with new XR glasses and Google partnership
item.description: Xreal, a long-time partner of Google in the smart glasses space, believes the notoriously difficult augmented reality and smart glasses industry may finally be approaching a turning point. For years, ...

item.title: How Pink Christmas Trees Became a Mid-Century Holiday Trend and Disappeared
item.description: The article explores the short-lived but visually striking trend of pink Christmas trees in the United States during the 1950s and 1960s. At the time, American culture was deeply influenced by optimis...

item.title: Trump signals uncertainty over Iran nuclear deal following claims of imminent agreement
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has introduced fresh uncertainty around the prospect of a nuclear agreement with Iran, just one day after suggesting that a deal was close to being finalized. In remarks sh...

item.title: Weather Channel meteorologist Felicia Combs’ career, education and marriage to George Howard
item.description: Felicia Combs is a well-known American meteorologist currently working at The Weather Channel in Atlanta, Georgia. The article highlights her professional journey, educational background and personal ...

item.title: Possible Crack Discovered in Overheated Chemical Tank at California Aerospace Facility May Reduce Explosion Risk
item.description: Emergency response teams at a Southern California aerospace manufacturing facility are closely monitoring a hazardous chemical incident involving a volatile storage tank filled with methyl methacrylat...

item.title: Police deploy continuous security outside Abhijeet Dipke’s residence amid online attention to emerging political group

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure second CAF Champions League title after draw in Rabat
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have been crowned CAF Champions League winners for the second time in their history after holding AS FAR Rabat to a tense 1-1 draw in the second leg of the final at the Prince Moulay...

item.title: Insurer disburses over N7 billion in claims to policyholders in 2025
item.description: In 2025, an insurance company (emPLE General Insurance Limited) reported that it has paid out over N7 billion in claims to Nigerians who experienced various forms of losses. The development highlights...
